author: thomreis
body:
#### PR description:

This PR adds the linear discriminant (LD) spike tagger algorithm and its conditions to the ECAL Phase 2 TP emulation.
To handle possible future changes to the algorithm the conditions format is kept generic and accessed with a helper class similar to the setup of the Phase 1 L1T. The conditions for the algorithm can be defined with crystal level granularity if needed.
Alternative algorithms (e.g. swiss cross algorithm) can be added in the future and selected via the config files.
The changes to the rest of the Phase 2 ECAL TP module are kept to a minimum.

Since these changes are affecting the ECAL TP development modules only no impact on normal validation workflows is expected.

#### PR validation:

Passes matrix WF 34434.612. Calculated LD values match manually calculated values.
title: Add LD spike tagger algorithm to ECAL Phase 2 TP emulation
